_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Review training documentation (e.g., Course Content Documents [CCD], lesson plans, student texts, examinations, Schedules of Instruction [SOI], and course descriptions).
reference_document_element_description: Skill in preparing regulatory examination evidence packages, including control narratives, policy documentation, audit trails, and supporting artifacts that demonstrate compliance to examiner standards.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI RC domain. RC-S-006 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-T-002 (DQ, cosine: 0.519), OP-T-010 (OP, cosine: 0.499).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.3/10 (raw 0.427). Shared vocabulary: [documentation]. DCWF-only terms [ccd, content, course, descriptions, documents, examinations] vs WIDAI-only terms [artifacts, audit, compliance, control, demonstrate, evidence] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.851 (P=0.843, R=0.859). Balanced P/R — the 20-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (100.0%). Despite 'Intersects with' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Review training documentation (e.g., Course Content Documents [CCD], lesson plan" and "Skill in preparing regulatory examination evidence packages, including control n". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.519 > STS 0.427 (gap +0.092). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [documentation] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 4.9%. Shared tokens: [documentation]. DCWF-only: [ccd, content, course, descriptions, documents, examinations]. WIDAI-only: [artifacts, audit, compliance, control, demonstrate, evidence].
